title: Notifications - Device disconnected
scenario: When a paired device disconnects while the app is in the background, tapping the "Device is disconnected" notification should redirect the user to the Home Screen showing the disconnected device.
steps: Pair a device with the Poly Lens app.
Send the app to the background (e.g., press the Home button or switch to another app).
Disconnect the paired device (e.g., turn off Bluetooth or physically disconnect the device).
Observe the notification area for a "Device is disconnected" notification.
expected: A "Device is disconnected" notification appears. Tapping the notification redirects the user to the Poly Lens app Home Screen showing the disconnected device.
